text: As described in the previous sections, there is a fundamental linkage between KEs given that the KE, “fatty acid beta oxidation” produces raw materials that are used in the KE, “ketogenesis (production of ketone bodies)”.  It is less clear how essential the former is to a sustainable throughput of the latter especially given that the latter can utilize substrates that can be produced by various other cellular energy processing pathways in addition to mitochondrial fatty acid beta oxidation.
